zh.Stoke Damerel, Devon, England: 英國戴文斯托克 達莫勒爾
zh.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特
zh.Reviers, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Fran: 法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯列維爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Vernon de Reviers於大約1108年出生在英國哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特時，她的父親Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers43歲，母親Adelise de Peverel35歲。她於1128年與Robert de Briwere在英國英格蘭戴文斯托克 達莫勒爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1145年在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯列維爾斯享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Vernon de Reviers于大约1108年出生在英国哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特时，她的父亲Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers43岁，母亲Adelise de Peverel35岁。她于1128年与Robert de Briwere在英国英格兰戴文斯托克 達莫勒爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1145年在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯列維爾斯享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Vernon de Reviers was born about 1108, in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, her father, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, was 43 and her mother, Adelise de Peverel, was 35. She married Robert de Briwere in 1128, in Stoke Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1145, in Reviers, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Vernon de Reviers est née environ 1108, à Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Peverel, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Briwere en 1128, à Stoke Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1145, à Reviers, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Vernon de Reviers um 1108 in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers 43 und ihre Mutter Adelise de Peverel 35. Sie hat 1128 in Stoke Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom Robert de Briwere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1145 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Reviers, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Vernon de Reviers è nata il circa 1108 nel Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Adelise de Peverel, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Briwere nel 1128, nel Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1145, nel Reviers, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Vernon de Reviersが約1108年にイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトで生まれた時，父Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviersは43歳，母Adelise de Peverelは35歳であった。1128年にイギリスイギリスデボンストク ダムレルでRobert de Briwereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1145年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスレヴィエルズで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Vernon de Reviers(이)가 대략 1108년 영국 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelise de Peverel(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1128년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스토크 다머에서 Robert de Briwere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1145년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 러에비어스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Vernon de Reviers nasceu aproximadamente 1108, em Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Peverel, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Briwere em 1128, em Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1145, em Reviers, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Vernon de Reviers родилась около 1108 г. в местности исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Peverel, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Briwere в 1128 г. в местности сток дэмирэл, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1145 г. в местности ревиирс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 39 лет.

Se casó con Robert de Briwere en 1128, en Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1145, en Reviers, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 39 años.
